info.title: ContentForge
info.description:
# ContentForge — Content Scoring & AI Generation Toolkit

Your post flopped. You'll never know exactly why if you wait until after.

**ContentForge** is a 40-endpoint REST API that scores your content against platform-specific best practices *before* you hit publish — returning a 0–100 score, a letter grade, and specific improvement tips in under 50ms. No guessing. No vague feedback. Just signal you can act on.

**Free tier includes every endpoint. No credit card required.**

---

## Why ContentForge Is Different

Most scoring tools are either too slow (LLM inference = 2–10s per call) or too vague ("add more emotion" isn't actionable). ContentForge uses a **pure heuristic engine** for all scoring: deterministic rules mapped to each platform's documented best practices. Same input, same score, every time — at <50ms with zero AI token cost.

AI generation is opt-in, for when you actually need a draft written from scratch.

---

## ⚡ 19 Instant Endpoints — <50ms, zero AI cost

Each platform has different rules. ContentForge checks the right signals for each:

| Endpoint | What It Checks |
|---|---|
| `/v1/score_tweet` | Length, hook, hashtags (1–2 optimal), emojis, CTA, power words |
| `/v1/score_linkedin_post` | Hook strength, paragraph structure, hashtag count, professional tone, CTA |
| `/v1/score_instagram` | Hashtag count (5–15 optimal), emojis, hook, line breaks, CTA |
| `/v1/score_youtube_title` | CTR signals, optimal length (40–60 chars), numbers, brackets, power words |
| `/v1/score_youtube_description` | SEO keywords, timestamps, chapter marks, links, CTA placement |
| `/v1/score_email_subject` | Open-rate signals, spam triggers, urgency, personalization tokens, length |
| `/v1/score_tiktok` | Hook speed, hashtag strategy, trending language, ideal length (≤150 chars) |
| `/v1/score_threads` | Conversational tone, question hooks, hashtag penalty, CTA |
| `/v1/score_facebook` | Engagement triggers, question hooks, emoji density, hashtag count |
| `/v1/score_pinterest` | Keyword density, instructional language, hashtags, spam signals |
| `/v1/score_ad_copy` | Headline length, benefit clarity, urgency, CTA strength, compliance signals |
| `/v1/score_readability` | Flesch-Kincaid reading ease + grade level + avg sentence/word length |
| `/v1/analyze_headline` | Power words (60+ tracked), numbers, questions, emotional triggers, length |
| `/v1/analyze_hashtags` | Uniqueness, spam risk, overuse, per-platform recommendations |
| `/v1/score_multi` | Score one piece of text across **all platforms** in a single call |
| `/v1/batch_score` | Score up to 20 draft texts against one platform — returned best-first |
| `/v1/compare` | Head-to-head comparison of two texts with winner + advantages |
| `/v1/ab_test` | A/B test 2-20 drafts on any platform — returns ranked list with confidence |

---

## ✦ 13 AI Generators — Gemini 2.5 Flash

When you need a draft written, rebuilt, or expanded:

| Endpoint | What It Returns |
|---|---|
| `/v1/improve_headline` | N AI-rewritten versions, each pre-scored and sorted best-first |
| `/v1/generate_hooks` | Scroll-stopping openers for any topic (viral / professional / casual / bold) |
| `/v1/rewrite` | Platform-optimized rewrite: Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, email, blog |
| `/v1/compose_assist` | Generate 2-5 rewrites, score each, and return the best-performing draft |
| `/v1/tweet_ideas` | 5–10 tweet angles for any niche with hashtag suggestions |
| `/v1/content_calendar` | 7-day calendar with daily themes and ready-to-post drafts |
| `/v1/thread_outline` | Complete Twitter thread: scroll-stopping hook + numbered body + CTA |
| `/v1/generate_bio` | Social bio for Twitter (160 chars), LinkedIn (300), or Instagram (150) |
| `/v1/generate_caption` | Instagram or TikTok caption with hashtags, emojis, and CTA |
| `/v1/generate_linkedin_post` | Full LinkedIn post: hook + story + insight + CTA |
| `/v1/generate_email_sequence` | 3-email drip: welcome → value → pitch, subject lines included |
| `/v1/generate_content_brief` | Research brief: audience, angle, SEO keywords, outline, hooks |
| `/v1/generate_ad_copy` | Short-form ad copy variants for Facebook, Google, and Twitter |

---

## Quick Example

**Instant score — no AI, no wait:**

```
curl -X POST https://contentforge-api-lpp9.onrender.com/v1/score_tweet \
  -H "X-RapidAPI-Key: YOUR_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"text": "I shipped in 48 hours. Here is what I learned 🧵 #buildinpublic"}'
```

**Response (~12ms):**

```json
{
  "score": 79,
  "grade": "B",
  "char_count": 59,
  "hashtag_count": 1,
  "emoji_count": 1,
  "suggestions": [
    "Add a specific number to the opening hook",
    "Length is in the lower-optimal range — aim for 71–100 chars"
  ]
}
```

---

## Who Uses ContentForge

- **Bloggers & newsletter writers** — `analyze_headline` every post before publish
- **Twitter/X power users** — draft → score → only post A/B-grade content
- **Indie hackers & founders** — daily `tweet_ideas` for your build-in-public niche
- **Content agencies** — generate full monthly calendars in seconds
- **Copywriters** — `rewrite` any text for a different platform instantly
- **Email marketers** — score subject lines for higher open rates
- **Developers** — clean JSON, CORS enabled, consistent schemas, fits any stack

---

## Plans

Instant endpoints (`score_*`, `analyze_*`, `batch_score`, `health`) never count against AI call quota.

| Plan | Price | AI Calls/mo | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **BASIC** | Free | 50 | 300 | 30 req/min |
| **PRO** | $9.99/mo | 750 | 1,000 | 30 req/min |
| **ULTRA** | $29.99/mo | 3,000 | 4,000 | 30 req/min |
| **MEGA** | $99/mo | 18,000 | 20,000 | 30 req/min |

---

**Live demo (no API key needed):** https://captainfredric.github.io/ContentForge/

**GitHub:** https://github.com/CaptainFredric/ContentForge

**Support:** captainarmoreddude@gmail.com

---

## Proof Dashboard

Track score delta, publish outcomes, and estimated revenue lift with:
- `/v1/record_score_delta`
- `/v1/record_publish_outcome`
- `/v1/record_revenue`
- `/v1/dashboard_stats`

tags.description: Instant heuristic scoring — zero latency, no AI token cost

tags.name: AI Content Generation
tags.description: AI-powered endpoints for generating and improving content

post.description: Score any tweet draft 0-100 for engagement potential before you post. Heuristic analysis — instant, no AI needed. Evaluates character count, hashtag usage, emoji presence, power words, and readability. Returns a grade (A-D) plus actionable improvement tips.

text.description: The tweet draft text to score
text.example: Built an API in 48 hours. It made $500 last month 💸 Here's how: #indiehacker #buildinpublic

example.text: Built an API in 48 hours. It made $500 last month 💸 Here's how: #indiehacker #buildinpublic
suggestions: Try starting with a number or a question for a stronger hook.

post.description: Score any LinkedIn post draft 0-100 for reach and engagement before you publish. Heuristic analysis, instant, no AI needed. Evaluates post length, hook strength (first paragraph preview), paragraph structure, hashtag count, list/bullet detection, call-to-action presence, URL penalty, emoji usage, and power words. Returns a grade (A-F) plus actionable improvement tips tailored to LinkedIn best practices.
The LinkedIn post draft text to score
post.example:
I spent 3 years building tools nobody used.

Then I changed one thing: I started scoring my own content before posting.

Here is what I learned:

- Your hook decides everything (keep it under 150 chars)
- Short paragraphs get 2x more read-throughs
- A question at the end doubles your comments

The result? 4x more engagement in 2 months.

What is one thing you changed that boosted your reach?

#contentcreation #linkedin #buildinpublic

hook_preview.description: First 150 chars of the opening paragraph

url_penalty_applied.description: True if an external URL was found (LinkedIn suppresses these)

has_cta.description: True if a call-to-action phrase was detected near the end

example.text: I spent 3 years building tools nobody used...
example.hook_preview: I spent 3 years building tools nobody used.
suggestions: Add 1-2 emojis to break up the text and draw the eye.

example.error: missing 'post' parameter. Send JSON body: {"post": "your linkedin post text"}

post.description: Score any Instagram caption draft 0-100 for engagement potential before you post. Heuristic analysis, instant, no AI needed. Evaluates caption length, hashtag count (5-15 optimal), emoji usage, hook strength (first 125 chars), call-to-action detection, line breaks, power words, and URL penalties. Returns a grade (A-F) plus actionable improvement tips tailored to Instagram best practices.

Stop scrolling. This changed everything.

I tried 30 days of cold showers 🧊💪

Save this for later 👇

#morningroutine #coldshower #productivity #selfimprovement #lifehacks

Evaluates title length (40-60 chars optimal), numbers, power words, brackets/parentheses, question format, CAPS emphasis, and thumbnail text complementarity. Returns a grade (A-F) plus actionable CTR improvement tips.

post.description: Score an email subject line (and optional preview/preheader text) 0-100 for open rate potential. Heuristic analysis, instant, no AI needed. Evaluates length (30-50 chars optimal), personalization tokens, numbers, power words, urgency words, spam trigger detection, ALL CAPS penalty, punctuation abuse, emoji usage, and preview text quality. Returns a grade (A-F) plus deliverability and engagement tips.

subject.description: The email subject line to score

preview_text.example: Open to see the strategy top creators use

suggestions: Consider adding one emoji to boost mobile open rates.

post.description: Score the same text across every supported platform (tweet, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, email) in a single call. Returns per-platform scores, grades, and suggestions plus the best-fit platform. Heuristic analysis, instant, no AI needed.

text.description: The text to score across platforms
text.example: Just shipped v2 of my SaaS 🚀 Revenue hit $5K MRR in 90 days. Here's what I learned: #buildinpublic

post.description: Score any text for readability 0-100 using Flesch-Kincaid metrics. Returns Flesch Reading Ease, Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level, reading level label (elementary through graduate), sentence and word statistics, and actionable improvement suggestions. Heuristic analysis, instant, no AI needed.

text.description: The text to analyze for readability
text.example: Short sentences work best. They keep the reader engaged. Use simple words too.

example.text: Short sentences work best. They keep the reader engaged. Use simple words too.
suggestions: Readability is acceptable. Minor simplification could improve clarity.

example.error: missing 'text' parameter. Send JSON body: {"text": "your content to analyze"}

post.description: Score a Meta Threads post for engagement and reach potential 0-100. Threads rewards conversational short-form text (50-250 chars), personal voice (I/me/my), question hooks, and CTAs (agree/thoughts/comment). Unlike other platforms, hashtags penalize Threads reach and links are stripped by Meta. Instant heuristic analysis, no AI needed.

text.example:
I spent 3 years building the wrong thing.

Here's what I wish I knew on day 1:

Talk to 10 customers before writing a single line of code.

Agree?

example.text: I spent 3 years building the wrong thing. Here's what I wish I knew on day 1: Talk to customers first. Agree?

post.description: Score a Facebook organic post for reach and engagement potential 0-100. Facebook rewards conversational text (40-300 chars), 1-2 hashtags, emojis, question hooks, and CTAs like 'comment/share/tag'. External links receive a mild downrank penalty. Instant heuristic analysis, no AI needed.

text.example:
We just hit 10,000 customers 🎉 and it's all because of you!

What's one thing you want us to build next? Drop a comment below!

example.text: We just hit 10,000 customers 🎉 and it's all because of you! What's one thing you want us to build next? Drop a comment!

post.description: Score a TikTok caption for engagement and reach potential 0-100. Evaluates hashtag count (3-6 is ideal), emoji usage (1-3 ideal), CTA keywords (follow/save/share/duet/stitch), TikTok power words (viral/pov/hack/trending), hook strength, number usage, and caps abuse. Instant heuristic analysis, no AI needed.

text.example:
POV: you stop guessing and start knowing if your content will go viral 🔥

Try this free tool 👇

#tiktok #viral #contentcreator

post.description: Analyze a list of hashtags for quality, spam risk, duplicates, and platform suitability 0-100. Supports twitter, instagram, tiktok, linkedin, and youtube with platform-specific ideal count ranges. Detects spam/banned tags (f4f, followme, likeforlike etc.), duplicate tags, overly long/short tags, caps abuse, and specificity variety (broad/niche/micro). Instant heuristic analysis, no AI needed.

platform.description: Target platform for ideal range evaluation

post.description: Score up to 20 text drafts against a single platform scorer in one API call. Returns all results ranked best-first plus a top-level 'best' pick. Instant heuristic analysis — no AI token cost. Perfect for picking the strongest draft from a set of AI-generated candidates.

texts.description: Array of draft texts to score (max 20)
example: Built an API in 48 hours. Made $500 last month 💸 #buildinpublic
I made a thing. Check it out.
5 lessons from shipping my first paid API in public #indiehacker

platform.description: Platform to score against (tweet, linkedin, instagram, headline, etc.)

post.description: Compare two pieces of content head-to-head across one or more platforms. Returns per-platform scores, a winner declaration, point difference, and specific advantages each text has over the other. Instant heuristic analysis — no AI token cost. Great for A/B testing drafts or benchmarking against competitors.

text_a.example: Ship fast, learn faster. The only metric that matters is velocity.

text_b.example: We are pleased to announce the release of our new product offering.

platforms.description: Platforms to compare on (defaults to tweet, linkedin, instagram)

400.description: Missing text_a, text_b, or invalid platforms

post.description: Submit 2-20 content drafts and a target platform. All drafts are scored and ranked best-first, with a winner recommendation, confidence level (high/medium/low), and statistical spread (min, max, avg, spread). Instant heuristic — no AI cost, <50ms.

drafts.description: Array of 2-20 content drafts to test

platform.description: Target platform (tweet, linkedin, instagram, tiktok, youtube, email, headline, pinterest, ad, threads, facebook)

drafts: We are pleased to announce our new product.
Built an API in 48hr — $500 last month

post.description: AI-powered content calendar generator. Give it a niche and get a ready-to-use multi-day posting plan with daily themes and pre-written post drafts. Supports Twitter, LinkedIn, and more. Ideal for content creators, social media managers, and indie hackers.

3 tools every solo founder needs: 1/ Stripe for payments 2/ Notion for docs 3/ Plausible for analytics. All under $50/mo. #buildinpublic
6 months ago I had 0 users. Today I have 847. The only thing I changed: I started shipping every week. Thread 🧵

post.description: Analyze a weak headline and generate N better versions using AI. First scores the original, identifies weaknesses, then rewrites it into improved versions — each one scored and graded. Perfect for the analyze → improve workflow. Returns versions sorted by score descending.

count.description: Number of improved versions to generate

original_suggestions: Make the headline longer and more specific.
Add a number for specificity (e.g. '5 ways', '$6K/mo').

improved_versions.text: Can You Really Earn $5,000 a Month Online? Discover the Secrets
Unlock $6,000/month: 7 Proven Strategies for Online Success

post.description: Instantly scores any headline 0-100 with a letter grade and actionable improvement suggestions. Uses heuristic analysis (no AI) — responses are instant (<50ms). Evaluates length, power words, numbers, capitalization, punctuation, and curiosity factors.

post.description: Generate a complete Twitter thread outline for any topic. Returns a hook tweet (scroll-stopping opener), numbered body tweets with key insights, and a CTA closing tweet — all ready to post. Configurable tweet count (3-10) and tone.

how to build a micro-SaaS in a weekend

3/ Build the smallest version that solves it. No fancy features. Just the core.

full_thread: Want to build a micro-SaaS in just one weekend? ...
Follow me for weekly micro-SaaS breakdowns...

post.description: Generate an optimized social media bio for Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram. Supply a name, niche, optional keywords, platform, and tone — get back a punchy, professional bio that stays within platform character limits.

niche.description: Your niche, role, or what you do.

keywords.description: Keywords or topics to weave into the bio (up to 10).

platform.description: Target platform: twitter (160 chars), linkedin (300 chars), instagram (150 chars).

tone.description: Tone of the bio: professional, casual, bold, friendly, etc.

example.name: Alex Rivera
example.bio: Indie dev building micro-SaaS tools to help others monetize their APIs & build public products | Side income, simplified.

post.summary: Generate an Instagram or TikTok Caption
post.description: AI-generated caption for Instagram or TikTok. Automatically applies platform-specific rules: Instagram gets a hook, 3-5 body lines, 5-10 hashtags, emojis, and a CTA. TikTok gets a hook under 150 characters, 3-5 hashtags, 1-2 emojis, and a follow/save CTA. Returns the caption text ready to copy-paste.

example.caption:
Your morning decides your day. 🌅

I wasted years hitting snooze. Then I built a 5-step routine that changed everything.

Here's what works:
- 5 min journal
- No phone for 30 min
- Move your body

What does your morning look like? Drop it below 👇

#morningroutine #productivity #selfimprovement #motivation #morningmindset

post.description: AI-generated LinkedIn post for any topic. Returns a full post with scroll-stopping hook, story or insight body paragraphs, and a closing CTA — formatted in LinkedIn's proven short-paragraph style with hashtags. Supports three tones: storytelling (personal story + lesson), professional (data-driven + 3-point structure), and motivational (inspirational + empowering CTA).

topic.example: lessons from launching my first SaaS

tone.description: Tone and structure of the post

example.topic: lessons from launching my first SaaS
lessons from launching my first SaaS
example.post:
I launched my first SaaS to zero users.

No signups. No feedback. Not even a rejection email.

I thought the idea was the hard part.

It wasn't.

The hard part was getting anyone to care.

Here's what I learned:

Building in public beats building in secret.

Shipping beats planning.

One real user beats 100 email subscribers.

What was the biggest lesson from your first launch?

#buildinpublic #saas #indiehacker #startups

post.description: Score a Pinterest pin description 0-100 for reach and saves. Pinterest is a search engine — keyword density, description length (150-500 chars), CTA, and avoiding promotional language are the key signals. Instant heuristic, no AI.

text.example: I batch-cooked every Sunday for 30 days and it changed my week! Here are the 5 easiest make-ahead meals for busy families. Save this for your next meal prep day! #mealprep #healthyeating #busyfamilies

post.description: Score a YouTube video description 0-100 for SEO and viewer value. Checks description length (200-1000 chars ideal), first-125-char search hook, timestamps/chapters, CTA, links, hashtag count (3-5 at end), and keyword density. Instant heuristic, no AI.
